# Aditya Raj Singh — Personal Website

> I work at the intersection of content, search, and automation. At Akamai, I help manage web content, improve SEO and GEO, and use AI to remove repetitive work from publishing and operations.

## Pages

- /: Personal homepage with hero, superpowers, and about sections
- /blog: Blog archive — writing on content, SEO, AI automation, and digital marketing
- /photos: Travel photography — Rajasthan, Vietnam, Bramhatal Trek, Nepal
- /cv: Curriculum vitae (PDF download)

## Skills

- AI Automation: custom GPT agents, automated workflows, AI-powered publishing
- Website Management: large-scale CMS (AEM), performance, security
- Digital Marketing: analytics, campaign strategy, brand storytelling
- SEO / GEO: search visibility, LLM discoverability, local search
